arts.ttl: ‘Got their mojo back’ – Swansea City vs Middlesbrough prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72’s writers offer their Swansea City vs Middlesbrough prediction ahead of their Saturday game in the Championship. The post ‘Got their mojo back’ – Swansea City vs Middlesbrough prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: I know what David Gray's answer to Swansea would be and exactly why Hibs boss interest is a good thing – Tam McManus
arts.sum: Hibs can rightly head to Celtic Park with confidence after a stunning week that began with a win over the champions and ended with another derby victory.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough's injuries are just bad luck, insists Michael Carrick after torrid two years
arts.sum: Asked about the poor injury record and if more could be done to prevent it, Carrick said: “The two injuries to George and Luke come from nothing. However, Boro’s injury record hasn’t improved as drastically as they would like, and is under the microscope once again as they face a defensive injury crisis at such a crucial stage of the season.

arts.ttl: 'Hibs' Gray a contender for Swansea job' - gossip
arts.sum: Hibernian's David Gray is linked with Swansea City as Steven Gerrard is said to be keen on a return to Rangers.

arts.ttl: Doak set to miss Nations League play-off after surgery
arts.sum: Scotland winger Ben Doak will likely miss this month's Nations League play-off double-header against Greece after having surgery on a thigh injury.

arts.ttl: Scotland winger Ben Doak set to miss Nations League playoff as injury setback threatens to end his season
arts.sum: Scotland winger Ben Doak could potentially miss the rest of the season as he recovers from surgery on a thigh injury.

arts.ttl: Preview: Swansea City vs. Middlesbrough - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Swansea City and Middlesbrough, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Doak set to miss Nations League play-off after surgery
arts.sum: Scotland winger Ben Doak will likely miss this month's Nations League play-off double-header against Greece after undergoing surgery on a thigh injury.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough's worst defensive injury fears confirmed for Swansea City after recent blows
arts.sum: Middlesbrough are expected to be down to the bare bones defensively at Swansea City - with Michael Carrick admitting Rav van den Berg and Luke Ayling's chances of making the trip are slim. That was the first game that Rav van den Berg missed after he suffered a knee injury in training that Carrick at least confirmed wasn't as serious as first feared.
